title: phlomis majkopensis
intro: Phlomis majkopensis, a member of the Lamiaceae family, is a perennial plant native to the Balkan Peninsula. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Phlomis majkopensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
